## Verdict

🔴 **AMFC weights are CHAOTIC** across periods (mean Jaccard = 0.169 < 0.2). Transaction costs may eat returns; KF can't learn cross-period dynamics.

## Decision per backlog spec

- 🔴 **Chaotic weight changes** → high transaction-cost burden; suggests:
  - Enable transaction-cost-aware selection (already wired via previous_weights in walk_forward)
  - Consider portfolio-level coherence regularization
  - KF cross-period dynamics learning is fundamentally degraded (NC8c-v2 carry meaningless if AMFC portfolios are unrelated)
